pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicit string 'sub-99' in the artifact injection loop
setup_task.sh Python data generation logic explicitly notes 'Hardware artifact' and 'Impossibly fast RT'
setup_task.sh explicitly uses random.uniform(15, 35) to generate the impossibly fast RTs
task description and verifier.py explicit checks
setup_task.sh uses random.gauss() + random.expovariate() to synthesize Ex-Gaussian RTs

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for pebl_env posner_cueing_ior_analysis task. Verified that the data is synthetically generated dynamically using an Ex-Gaussian process (random.gauss + random.expovariate). Confirmed that the contaminated participant is 'sub-99', which receives artificially fast RTs between 15 and 35 ms via random.uniform(15, 35) to simulate a hardware bounce. Finally, verified that the expected output JSON report path matches the task specifications and verifier.
